requirements.oracle: Async transfer public API and public errors are exported.
hidden_tests: normal transfer updates both accounts, receipt, and history exactly once

requirements.oracle: Strict schema validation, safe integers, no coercion/unknown fields, distinct IDs.
hidden_tests: floor boundary succeeds and one unit below the floor fails without mutation

requirements.oracle: Accounts exist, currencies match, and expected versions match.
hidden_tests: version and idempotency conflicts preserve state; replay precedes version checks

requirements.oracle: Post-debit balance may equal but not cross minBalance.
hidden_tests: floor boundary succeeds and one unit below the floor fails without mutation

requirements.oracle: Idempotency is checked inside exclusivity before mutable preconditions.
hidden_tests: version and idempotency conflicts preserve state; replay precedes version checks
concurrent duplicate requests commit once and return the same receipt

requirements.oracle: Existing SerialExecutor boundary serializes competing transfers.
hidden_tests: concurrent duplicate requests commit once and return the same receipt

requirements.oracle: Success updates both accounts once, allocates one sequence, and appends one record.
hidden_tests: normal transfer updates both accounts, receipt, and history exactly once

requirements.oracle: Audit rejection commits no internal state and does not consume sequence/idempotency.
hidden_tests: audit rejection rolls back accounts, sequence, history, and idempotency

requirements.oracle: Receipt exact shape uses post-state and documented transfer ID.
hidden_tests: normal transfer updates both accounts, receipt, and history exactly once
input, receipt, history, and audit objects are detached

requirements.oracle: All failure modes preserve account/history/idempotency/sequence state.
hidden_tests: audit rejection rolls back accounts, sequence, history, and idempotency
version and idempotency conflicts preserve state; replay precedes version checks

requirements.oracle: Only allowed files change; executor/docs/package/source set remain intact.
hidden_tests: scope-protected files and source-module set are unchanged

expected_agent_tests: Audit sink rejection leaves balances, versions, sequence, history, and idempotency unchanged.
Two concurrent transfers cannot both spend the same source balance.
Two concurrent identical requests return one receipt and create one audit record.
Replay works after account versions change; request-ID collision fails.
Exact minBalance succeeds and one unit below fails atomically.
Mutation of input, receipt, history, or audit argument cannot alter internal state.
